name: GetPatientOutstandingBills
bodySql:
SELECT b.id, b.amount, b.insurance_covered, b.patient_owes, b.status, b.billing_date
FROM billing b
WHERE b.patient_id = @patientId AND b.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY b.billing_date DESC;
description: Returns pending bills for a single patient.

name: MarkBillPaid
bodySql:
UPDATE billing SET status = 'paid' WHERE id = @billingId;
SELECT id, patient_id, patient_owes, status FROM billing WHERE id = @billingId;
description: Marks a billing record as paid and returns the updated row.
